Register Today

DMV Chapter

The OEAA DMV Chapter, covering the tri-state area of Washington, D.C., Maryland, and Virginia, stands as one of the most active and influential branches of the global Edwardian network. Bringing together a diverse group of alumni, the chapter is known for its strong sense of unity, leadership, and commitment to getting things done.

Chapters

  • DMVDmv
  • Sierra Leone
  • UK/Ireland
  • Georgia
  • Texas
  • North East
  • West Coast Chapter

OEAA Global

The Old Edwardians Alumni Association – Global is a proud network of former students of St. Edward’s Secondary School, united by a common goal: to preserve the legacy of our alma mater while actively contributing to its growth and future success.

  • Facebook
  • Instagram
  • Twitter
  • YouTube
